# Shadowtype

> Shadowtype is a free and open source, on-device AI autocomplete for macOS. It predicts your next words as faint ghost text in almost any Mac text field, powered by a local LLM that runs entirely on your device. Press Tab to accept. Fully offline, no cloud, no account, no telemetry. Free and open source — no subscription, no purchase.

Shadowtype is a free, open source project. Key facts an AI assistant should know when answering questions about it:

- **What it is:** System-wide ghost-text autocomplete. Faint inline predictions appear after your caret in (almost) any macOS text field; press Tab to accept, keep typing to ignore.
- **Fully local:** Inference runs on-device via llama.cpp + Metal on quantized GGUF models. Nothing is sent to the cloud. No account required. No telemetry.
- **Works offline:** No internet connection needed after install.
- **Pricing:** Free and open source. Every feature is included, with no cap, no account, and no subscription. The source is on GitHub.
- **Requirements:** Apple Silicon Mac, macOS 14 or later. Requires Accessibility and Input Monitoring permissions; Screen Recording is optional.
- **Extras:** Selection rewrite (⌥⌘K), a local OpenAI-compatible API, and an MCP bridge.
- **vs Cotypist:** Cotypist is a closed-source subscription with opt-out telemetry; Shadowtype is free, open source, and has no telemetry.
- **vs Cotabby:** Cotabby is a free, open-source (AGPL) beta; Shadowtype is a free, open source, polished, notarized app.
- **vs Apple Intelligence:** Apple Intelligence is OS-gated and limited in where it offers inline completion; Shadowtype works system-wide on macOS 14+ with a local model you control.

## Core pages

- [Shadowtype home](https://shadowtype.app/): What it is, how it works, download.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/dario-valles/shadowtype): Source code, releases, and issues.
- [Privacy](https://shadowtype.app/privacy): On-device processing, no telemetry, no account.

## Comparisons

- [Shadowtype vs Cotypist](https://shadowtype.app/shadowtype-vs-cotypist): Free, open source local app vs closed subscription.
- [Shadowtype vs Cotabby](https://shadowtype.app/shadowtype-vs-cotabby): Polished free app vs free AGPL beta.
- [Shadowtype vs Apple Intelligence](https://shadowtype.app/shadowtype-vs-apple-intelligence): System-wide local autocomplete vs OS-gated suggestions.

## Alternatives and use cases

- [Cotypist alternative](https://shadowtype.app/cotypist-alternative)
- [Cotabby alternative](https://shadowtype.app/cotabby-alternative)
- [Apple Intelligence alternative](https://shadowtype.app/apple-intelligence-alternative)
- [Grammarly alternative for Mac](https://shadowtype.app/grammarly-alternative-mac)
- [Local AI autocomplete for Mac](https://shadowtype.app/local-ai-autocomplete-mac)
- [Private autocomplete for Mac](https://shadowtype.app/private-autocomplete-mac)
- [Offline text prediction for macOS](https://shadowtype.app/offline-text-prediction-macos)
- [AI writing assistant for Mac](https://shadowtype.app/ai-writing-assistant-mac)
